formName: Step 3 - Technical Information (Crown Land Tenure Option)
formDescription: This section explains the difference between a Permit Over Crown Land (PCL) and a Land Act tenure. It allows the applicant to choose between minimal, non-exclusive rights (PCL) or greater rights including exclusive use (Land Act tenure).

V1PCLChangePCLToCLT.title: Do you want to change from a Permit Over Crown Land to a Land Act tenure application?
V1PCLChangePCLToCLT.description: Permit Over Crown Land provides minimal, non-exclusive rights. Land Act tenure provides greater rights including exclusive use. If 'Yes' is selected, a separate Land Act application and fees are required at the same time as this water application.
